title: swertia crassiuscula subsp. crassiuscula
intro: Swertia crassiuscula subsp. crassiuscula is a plant species in the family Gentianaceae, commonly known as a type of gentian, which is a genus of flowering plants that have medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Swertia crassiuscula subsp. crassiuscula include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive function, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
